description: Register a new indexing source (memory_dir / code_repo / ...). (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_add_source

description: Audit the mnemo knowledge graph for structural issues. Deterministic detectors (no LLM): stale (nodes marked SUPERSEDED), duplicates (within-type pairs above cosine 0.95), orphan_references (citations to deleted nodes). Opt-in LLM-augmented detectors: contradictions (v5.13.0; within-type pairs in cosine 0.5-0.85 band with a negation differential) and semantic_orphans (v5.14.0; per-node concept extraction -- CamelCase/snake_case/ALL_CAPS -- whose terms aren't defined in any other node's name or description). Both default to severity 'candidate', elevated to 'high' when ``MNEMO_ANALYZE_LLM_JUDGE=1`` + ``ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`` are set and Claude confirms. Set ``propose_actions=true`` (v5.15.0) to attach an LLM-proposed concrete refactor action (merge / supersede / delete / create_definition / fix_citation) to each high/medium finding -- requires ``MNEMO_ANALYZE_PROPOSE_ACTIONS=1`` + key; actions are proposals the user reviews, never auto-applied. Pass ``lens="code"`` (v5.16.0) to run a DOMAIN lens instead of the agnostic detectors: the code lens surfaces ``dead_code`` (private, uncalled functions/methods via the call graph; LLM-judged when the opt-in flag is set) and ``god_object`` (v5.17.0; oversized classes/modules by exact method/definition count -- deterministic, and v5.18.0 LLM-judged for cohesion when ``MNEMO_ANALYZE_LLM_JUDGE`` is set: a grab-bag becomes 'high', a cohesive facade is dropped) and ``cyclic_imports`` (v5.19.0; module import cycles via Tarjan SCC over the imports graph -- deterministic, severity medium). Returns ``{ran_at, node_count_scanned, findings, summary}``. Optional ``types`` filter restricts detectors. Phase 1 + 2 + 3 of mnemo's Understanding arc. (risk: safe)

lens.description: v5.16.0: optional domain lens. null = agnostic detectors. "code" = the code lens (dead_code + god_object + cyclic_imports). A lens REPLACES the agnostic suite; unknown lens runs nothing.

propose_actions.description: v5.15.0: opt-in refactor_actions enrichment. true attaches an LLM-proposed action to each high/medium finding (requires MNEMO_ANALYZE_PROPOSE_ACTIONS=1 + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY); null/omit = off.

types.description: Optional filter: subset of the active suite. Agnostic (no lens): ["stale", "duplicates", "orphan_references", "contradictions", "semantic_orphans"]. With lens="code": ["dead_code", "god_object", "cyclic_imports"].

name: mnemo_analyze

description: Apply retrieval scoring-weight deltas (alpha/beta/gamma/delta/epsilon/zeta) to the live config -- the Settings retune assistant's apply step. Bounded + recoverable. Returns the before/after so the page can validate. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_apply_retune

description: Mutate settings.json (scoring / retention / ...). (risk: danger)
name: mnemo_change_settings

description: Create a new memory node. Reindex picks it up later. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_create_node

description: Permanently delete a node (cascades its edges). (risk: danger)
name: mnemo_delete_node

description: Read lines [start, end] (1-based, inclusive) from a source file. Capped at 400 lines per call. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_get_code_lines

description: Edges connected to a node. direction in {out,in,both}; optional relation filter. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_get_edges

description: Full body + frontmatter for one node by id. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_get_node

description: Highlight a SET of related nodes ON THE LIVE NEBULA GRAPH: the custom WebGL renderer (nebula-gl.js) spotlights them (full vivid color, labelled) and dims the rest to a cool field (never hidden), and the camera frames the set. Pair with mnemo_session_nodes to show 'what's related in this session'. This DOES light them up on the graph -- tell the user so (the v4.6 custom renderer's setHighlight() delivers it; the old cosmos highlight ceiling stays closed). The /graph page must be open for the user to see it. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_highlight_nodes

description: List the mnemo workflow skills available to load. Returns each skill's name + description. Call this first, then mnemo_run_skill to load one's guidance. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_list_skills

description: Navigate the browser to a mnemo path (e.g. /graph). (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_navigate

description: Open a UI panel (detail side panel, search popover, ...). (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_open_panel

description: The user's CURRENT screen: the live page state the UI attached to this conversation (page, path, selected node, visible nodes, query, weights, ...). Call this FIRST when the user says 'this page' / 'here' / 'what's on screen' so you act in-context. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_page_context

description: Wipe a chat conversation + all its messages. (risk: danger)
name: mnemo_purge_conversation

description: Hybrid Graph-RAG retrieval over memory + code, ranked and token-budgeted. Use for broad research. Returns ranked hits each with a [mnemo:<id>] citation. v5: pass ``exclude_local_only=true`` when the output will be pasted into a foreign LLM (the prompt-architect skill does this); the result's ``local_only_excluded`` count tells the UI how many confidential nodes were dropped pre-paste. (risk: safe)

exclude_local_only.description: When true, nodes flagged ``local_only`` (see v5 design) are filtered from the result set. The count of dropped nodes is exposed as ``local_only_excluded`` on the response so the dock can warn before paste.

name: mnemo_query

description: Acknowledge a reindex request. The actual reindex runs via the daemon's /v1/reindex SSE channel (a tool must not block on it). (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_reindex_source

description: Unregister a source + cascade-clean its nodes. (risk: danger)
name: mnemo_remove_source

description: Load a mnemo skill's guidance into the conversation and follow it for the rest of this turn. ``skill_name`` is the skill's directory name (or its frontmatter name). (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_run_skill

description: Scroll a DOM element (by CSS selector) into view. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_scroll_to

description: List nodes by type, optional name glob + project filter. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_search_by_type

description: Select/focus a node on the current Nebula or /code view. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_select_node

description: The nodes this conversation has cited or acted on, plus their 1-hop neighbours. Use to ground 'what's related in this session / highlight it on the Nebula graph' before mnemo_highlight_nodes. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_session_nodes

description: Apply a type / confidence / layout filter on the view. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_set_filter

description: Register a thumbs up/down on a retrieval hit. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_thumbs_feedback

description: BFS from a node up to max_hops (optional relation filter). The 'why-is-this-here' provenance walk. Returns nodes tagged with their hop distance + the edges traversed. (risk: safe)
name: mnemo_traverse

description: Patch a node's name / description / body / frontmatter. (risk: confirm)
name: mnemo_update_node
